identity.name: E1
identity.core_philosophy: Precision, Clarity, and Objective Truth. The resume is a document of fact; the tool must feel like a precision instrument.

rules: No gradients on backgrounds. Use flat, solid colors.
High contrast is mandatory. Text must be #0F172A or #334155, never lighter for body text.
Use 'Electric Indigo' (#4F46E5) sparingly - only for primary actions and active states.

grid_lines.description: Visible grid lines separating sections to emphasize structure.

decoration.style: Minimalist. No illustrations. Use abstract geometric shapes or high-quality photography.
decoration.textures: Subtle grain on the background (opacity 0.02) to soften the digital harshness.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4F46E5] text-white hover:bg-[#4338CA] rounded-md px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:bg-white focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500/20 rounded-md h-12 px-4 transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-indigo-100 transition-colors

resume_preview.style: bg-white shadow-2xl shadow-slate-200/50 border border-slate-100 aspect-[1/1.414] w-full max-w-[800px] mx-auto p-[10mm] text-left transform origin-top transition-transform

landing_page.hero: Split screen or Center-aligned with massive typography. 'Grid' layout preferred.

builder_page.layout: Fixed split-screen. Left 40% scrollable (Form), Right 60% fixed (Preview). On mobile, stack them with a 'Preview' toggle.
builder_page.spacing: Dense in the form, spacious in the preview.

hero_background.usage: Hero section background with heavy overlay or side image

interactions.resume_update: Animate content changes with layout preservation (layout prop in framer-motion).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Instrument Sans' for all Headings. Import it in index.css.
The Resume Builder Page MUST use a Split-Screen layout on Desktop. Form on Left, Preview on Right.
Do NOT use standard HTML date pickers. Use a custom styled text input or Shadcn Popover + Calendar.
Ensure the PDF download matches the visual preview exactly. Suggest using 'react-to-print' or 'jspdf'.
Keep the Resume Templates SIMPLE. ATS-friendly means: No columns (or simple 2-col), standard headings, bullet points, no graphics.
For the Landing Page: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for features.
Implement a 'Score Meter' in the builder that updates as the user fills data (gamification).
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no centered everything, no default shadows.
Micro-animations: Every button click, hover, and input focus must have feedback.
Spacing: Use 'p-8' or 'gap-8' as your default unit. Allow breathing room.
Dark Mode: Implement it, but optimize it to be 'Anthracite' (#111), not Pitch Black (#000).
Accessibility: Ensure all text inputs have associated labels and ARIA descriptions.
Testing: Add data-testid to all major interactive elements (e.g., 'resume-form-submit', 'add-experience-btn').
